name: @web3d/document
description: SceneDocument contracts, validation, commands, migration, and deterministic archives.

scripts.build: vite build --config vite.config.ts && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node ../../scripts/release/rewrite-declaration-imports.mjs dist
scripts.test: pnpm generate:validators && node scripts/smoke-standalone-validator.mjs && vitest run --root ../.. --config vitest.config.ts packages/document/src/document.test.ts
